title: IceNFireFactionsWeapons
description: this project is supposed to be another part of my other project about faction in iceandfire dragons, which will get released soon. it adds ancientite, a rare ore made of ancient dragon remains. it adds weapons, a boss, and armors
body:
Ice 'N Fire Factions is about adding 4 factions - Slayers (Those who end dragons), Tamers (Those who tame dragons to take over the world), Sanctum (Those who worship dragons), And Accord (Pacifists?).

So this mod **Ice 'N Fire Factions Weapons** is about adding weapons, armor sets, and a boss, and ore to the Ice 'N Fire Factions mod. this is mainly for a modpack.

## This project adds-

### Armor Sets
- 5 armor sets  
  - Ancientite  
  - Ancientite Slayer  
  - Ancientite Tamer  
  - Ancientite Sanctum  
  - Ancientite Accord  

### Weapons
- 5 weapons  
  - Dragonslayer  
  - Commander Staff  
  - Ancient Key  
  - Annihilator Ray  
  - And lastly the Ancient Staff  

### Blocks
- 1 block  
  - The Ancient Vault which summons **The Ancient One**

### Bosses
- 1 boss  
  - The Ancient One
